name: cloakroom
description: Cloakroom — checks your PII at the door, hands the API a ticket, and gives everything back on the way out.

scripts.build: npx esbuild src/server.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node22 --format=esm --outfile=dist/server.js && npx esbuild src/cli.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node22 --format=esm --banner:js='#!/usr/bin/env node' --outfile=dist/cli.js
